get_involved_and_help_spread_bitcoin: Tengani nawo mbali ndi kuthandiza kufalitsa Bitcoin
get_involved_description: Zipangizo zathu zaulere zimapangitsa kukhala kosavuta kufalitsa Bitcoin.
get_involved_intro_1: Zingakhale zomvetsa chisoni kukhala mu dziko lino masiku ano.
get_involved_intro_2: Ndalama zathu zathyoka. Chifukwa chake, mbali zofunika za chikhalidwe zathokanso.
get_involved_intro_3: Ngati muli mu Bitcoin kale, mudziwa chikhumbo chomwe Bitcoin imabweretsa. Chiyembekezo cha tsogolo lowala lopangidwa ndi ndalama zabwino.
get_involved_intro_4: Koma anthu ambiri okhala nawo pafupi sadziwa za Bitcoin. Akukhala mu dziko lomwelo lothyoka ngati inu, koma popanda chiyembekezo chowathandiza kudutsa mdima.
get_involved_intro_5: Koma mutha kuthandiza kusintha. Tapanga zipangizo zambiri zaulere kuti zikhale zosavuta kufalitsa chiyembekezo chomwe Bitcoin imabweretsa kwa okhala nawo pafupi.
get_involved_sticker_content_1: Mutha kuthandiza kuphunzitsa okhala nawo pafupi za Bitcoin popanda kulankhulana ndi aliyense. Yikani chimodzi mwa zitikiti zathu zaulere za Bitcoin poyera.
get_involved_sticker_content_2: Anthu mazana amasikana ma QR code pa zitikiti izi mwezi uliwonse. Zitikiti za kukwera kwa mitengo zimalumikizana ndi tsamba la
get_involved_sticker_content_3: Bitcoin ngati yankho la kukwera kwa mitengo.
get_involved_sticker_content_4: Zitikiti zina zimalumikizana ndi tsamba lathu loyambirira lophunzitsa lomwe limaonetsa anthu momwe
get_involved_sticker_content_6: Poyika zitikiti izi mdera lanu pamalo omwe anthu aziona, mutha kuthandiza okhala nawo pafupi kuyamba ulendo wawo wa Bitcoin.
get_involved_postcard_content_1: Mutha kuthandiza kufalitsa Chiyembekezo cha Bitcoin kwa munthu amene mumudziwa potumiza khadi limodzi la makadi athu aulere.
get_involved_postcard_content_2: Kumbuyo kwa khadi lililonse kuli ndi mawu olimbikitsa za Bitcoin pamodzi ndi QR code kuti muphunzire zambiri.
get_involved_postcard_content_3: Potumiza khadi la Bitcoin kwa munthu, mutha kuwathandiza kuona Bitcoin munjira yatsopano.
get_involved_business_content_1: Mukufuna kuthandiza kumanga chuma cha Bitcoin? Chipangizo chathu cha Bizinesi cha Bitcoin chimapangitsa kukhala kosavuta kuyankhulana ndi bizinesi za kulandira malipiro a Bitcoin.
get_involved_business_content_2: Chipangizo chilichonse cha bizinesi chimaphatikiza mapepala omwe amasonyeza phindu lolandira malipiro a Bitcoin. Pepala lililonse limalumikizana ndi
get_involved_business_content_3: zipangizo zaulere za bizinesi za Bitcoin.
